do_not_merge.reason: Different service variants (limited_stop vs local) on the same base route B82. Per per-kind route rule: different variants never merge.
Different service variants (limited_stop vs sbs) on the same base route B82. Per per-kind route rule: different variants never merge.
Different service variants (local vs sbs) on the same base route B82. Per per-kind route rule: different variants never merge.
Different base route IDs (B82 vs B82E). Per route identity rule, identity = base route id + service variant; different base route IDs denote distinct routes.

rationale: All six records have distinct identity keys: the three B82 records differ in service variant (limited, local, sbs), and the remaining three records have different base route IDs (B82E, BM2, BM5). The per-kind route rule that different variants never merge, and that different base route IDs denote different routes, directly applies. No ambiguity exists because payload identity fields clearly specify route_id and service_variant for each record.
